description: Gold set for the OASIS traversal (next-step) benchmark. Each task is a realistic compound, multi-step agent workflow. `start_intent` is the capability an agent resolves first; `gold_next_intents` are the REAL downstream capabilities needed to finish the job. The benchmark measures what fraction of those next-steps OASIS surfaces from the start intent alone (one call), via the authored capability graph + entity-flow. A pure-vector engine surfaces NONE of them (it returns one ranked endpoint list, no relationships). All intent_ids are verified against dist/index.json capabilities. Misses are genuine multi-hop / cross-domain gaps (the deeper steps an agent reaches progressively as it advances), not relabeled trivia.

tasks.task: Stand up a web presence for a new startup: register the domain, host the landing page, read its WHOIS/DNS to wire up records, and email the launch announcement.

Research a target account before a sales call: enrich the company from its domain, find the decision-makers, pull its legal-entity record, scan its social presence, send an intro email, and check its stock price.
Reach a prospect by text: find the person, check their social profiles, validate their phone number, and send an SMS.
Localize a street address: geocode it, fetch the local weather, look up nearby civic/government services, and pull property listings in the area.
Build a daily weather brief: get the forecast, summarize it with an LLM, pull weather-related news, and text it to the user.
Produce and ship a marketing graphic: generate the image, host it at a public URL, and email the link to the team.
Voice a script: synthesize speech from the text, host the audio file, and place an automated voice call with it.
Turn a web page into a knowledge-base entry: scrape it, extract structured fields from the document, translate it, embed it for retrieval, and summarize with an LLM.
Build an equity snapshot: get the live quote, pull macro/economic indicators, convert the price to EUR via FX rates, scan trading signals, and run web research on recent news.
Bargain-hunt for a product: compare current prices, review the price history, set a price-drop alert, and SMS me when it fires.
Answer a research question with citations: run web research, scrape the key source, pull related news headlines, compute a derived answer, and summarize with an LLM.
Investigate a suspicious domain: read its WHOIS/DNS, enrich the owning company, resolve its IP, and geolocate the host.
Profile a brand's social footprint: pull its social data, find the people behind it, discover related influencers, draft outreach with an LLM, and email it.
Run a verified email send: validate the recipient address, send the email, and fall back to SMS after validating their phone number.
Analyze a crypto wallet: run on-chain analytics, check token balances, pull spot prices, query the chain via RPC, and research the project on the web.
Publish a static site: host the page, attach a custom domain, capture a screenshot for the preview card, and email the live link.
Underwrite a property: pull the listing, geocode it, look up civic/zoning services, check local weather risk, and pull regional economic data.
Process a voicemail: transcribe the audio, translate the text, summarize it with an LLM, and email the summary.
